headline: Merck ASCO 2026 Data Sheds Light On Oncology Outlook And Valuation
summary: Merck (NYSE:MRK) plans to present more than 100 oncology abstracts at the 2026 ASCO Annual Meeting. The company will share five year outcomes from pivotal trials of KEYTRUDA combinations in melanoma and triple negative breast cancer. Merck will also highlight data on next generation antibody drug conjugates and individualized neoantigen therapies. For investors following NYSE:MRK, this ASCO 2026 update is at the center of Merck's core oncology focus. KEYTRUDA is a key part of its cancer...
